response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the core requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated (only English, Romanian, basic German), and there is no demonstrated experience with embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, MACsec/802.1X, Linux kernel modification, or chip-vendor SDKs. Primary stack is web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than C for UNIX embedded development. The Japanese requirement alone is a hard disqualifier.
strengths: Long software engineering tenure across diverse stacks and domains
Some C/C++ exposure via early National Instruments LabWindows/CVI work
concerns: No Japanese language proficiency listed (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, switch, or networking-protocol (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) experience
No evidence of Linux kernel source modification or C-for-UNIX as a primary skill

key_factors.factor: C programming not a current core skill
